# Launch notebook 🚀

Welcome to the **café review** for 日本語 readers; the rare sign 𝌆 is preserved too.

<Callout tone="calm" icon="telescope" compact>
  We ship on {launchDay}, after checking the [runbook](./runbook) &amp; changelog.

> Keep the rollback path boring and the status message honest.

- [x] Pin the image digest
- [ ] Upload ![a tiny launch patch](./launch-patch.png "mission patch")

Use `npm run verify`, write \*literal stars\*, and keep the entity &copy; in snapshots.
